config.PoisonBarRed.tooltip:
Controls the red color value for the main poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
config.PoisonBarGreen.tooltip:
Controls the green color value for the main poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
config.PoisonBarBlue.tooltip:
Controls the blue color value for the main poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
config.PoisonBarTopRed.tooltip:
Controls the red color value for the brighter top edge of the poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
config.PoisonBarTopGreen.tooltip:
Controls the green color value for the brighter top edge of the poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
config.PoisonBarTopBlue.tooltip:
Controls the blue color value for the brighter top edge of the poison fill.
Accepted values: 0 to 255.
